content:
Hey guys, looking for some advice from people who have sold sites before.
A few months ago, I built a niche site covering a specific Gacha game (focused heavily on Character Builds, Loadouts, and Tier Lists). The site exploded during the launch window. In the first couple of months, it pulled in about $1,500 - $2,000 a month via Ezoic. The engagement was crazy I had about 600k visits but almost 1.9 Million pageviews, because people click through all the different character builds. Total revenue over the last 4 months was around $2,300.
Right now, i am updating only every patch takes me around 30 min with AI ( possible without aswell , only Jsons as Database and easy structure) it’s currently making a passive $100 - $200 a month on autopilot.
What could i expect to get are there even People interested ?
With the right Timing and Right Game the Potential to make more Money is 100% there but i am tired and dont have any motivation anymore.

  submitted by   /u/Accomplished-Cat5451
[link]   [comments]
